prompt: Write 3 LinkedIn posts (120-180 words each) for legalof.ai (the white-label legal vertical of openpatent.ai) targeting in-house counsel and GCs at Series A+ startups. Each post must (a) open with a hook about AI-generated inventions and prior-art risk, (b) mention the 6-layer cryptographic disclosure + Bitcoin OTS, (c) end with a soft CTA to the waitlist. Use DEFONEOS mythic voice. Return ONLY JSON: {posts:[3 strings], signature:string}.
